meaning: in a flash, before one knows it
quizQuestion:
あっとい{___}に砂嵐に襲われた。
(Before we knew where we were, the dust storm was on us.)
pedagogicalNote: どうせ = after all/anyway; できるだけ = as much as possible; 少しも~ない = not at all; なんとなく = vaguely/somehow; どうしても = absolutely/no matter what; どちらかといえば = if I had to say; せっかく = with effort/since we're here; あっと言う間 = in a flash; とっさに = reflexively; だからこそ = precisely because; とても~ない = can't possibly
